title: GetResponse vs Sendinblue (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare GetResponse and Sendinblue email marketing platforms. See pricing, features, and which tool suits your needs best.
h1: GetResponse vs Sendinblue: Detailed Platform Comparison
intro: GetResponse and Sendinblue (now Brevo) are both established email marketing platforms with freemium models, but they serve different business needs. GetResponse excels for content creators and webinar hosts, while Sendinblue specializes in transactional email and multi-channel communications. This comparison helps you determine which platform aligns with your marketing goals.
choose_a_if: You're an online course creator or webinar host needing integrated course and funnel-building tools
You want unlimited daily email sends on the free plan
You prefer a platform with strong landing page and conversion funnel capabilities
choose_b_if: You need to send SMS and WhatsApp messages alongside email campaigns
You require transactional email capabilities with API access
You want to scale with an unlimited contact free tier and prefer an all-in-one CRM solution

faq.a: Neither is universally better—it depends on your use case. GetResponse is superior for webinars, courses, and landing pages, while Sendinblue excels in transactional email, SMS, and multi-channel marketing. Sendinblue scores higher on G2 and Trustpilot, but GetResponse may be better for content creators.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, GetResponse or Sendinblue?
faq.a: Sendinblue offers better free tier value with 100,000 free contacts versus GetResponse's 500, though it caps daily sends at 300. For paid plans, GetResponse starts at $19/month while Sendinblue begins at $25/month. The best choice depends on your contact volume and sending frequency.

faq.q: Can I switch from Sendinblue to GetResponse?
faq.a: Yes, most email marketing platforms support contact list imports via CSV or API. Both GetResponse and Sendinblue allow you to export your subscriber lists and import them into the other platform. Ensure you have proper consent for your contacts before migrating.
